title: Just Married White Latex Balloons (30cm) Pack of 5 - Perfect for Wedding Celebrations and Photo Props
features: JUST MARRIED LATEX BALLOONS: Celebrate your nuptials in style with these beautifully designed, high-quality just-married balloons, perfect for adding a touch of elegance and flair to your wedding festivities.
VIBRANT WHITE COLOR: Our 30cm just married balloons come in a stunning bright white hue, ideal for complementing any wedding theme or color scheme and easily visible in photos and videos.

PACK OF 5: This pack includes five premium quality, large 30cm balloons, ensuring that you have a sufficient quantity to adorn your wedding venue, attach to carriages, or use as memorable photo props.

IDEAL PHOTO PROPS: Capture the joy and happiness of your special day with these unique just-married balloons, an excellent addition to your wedding photos and a fun way to engage your guests in the celebrations.

PERFECT FOR WEDDING CELEBRATIONS: Let the world know you've just tied the knot with these eye-catching just-married white latex balloons, a must-have accessory for your wedding celebrations and a beautiful memento to cherish.
description: Product Description Enjoy the festivities in shimmering style with these Pearlised Latex Just Married Wedding Balloons. Featuring "Just Married" text and a fun wedding car design, these white party balloons are ideal for decorating a wedding reception. Arrange them with foil balloons, a balloon weight and curling ribbon to create a dazzling table centrepiece or floor-standing balloon bouquet. Alternatively, use these balloons as eye-catching wedding car decorations to announce the newlyweds to the world. Box Contains 1 x Pack of 5 Pearlised Latex Just Married Balloons
